title: Presence Footsteps [FORGE]
description: This mod is an unofficial port of the Presence Footsteps mod to the Forge modloader.
body:
This mod is an **unofficial** port of the Presence Footsteps mod to the Forge and NeoForge mod loaders.

For more information, you can visit the official mod page:
https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps
